title: Mediators Trying to Pull U.S. and Iran Back From Brink, Officials Say
summary_full: Days of strikes by the two countries have given way to an uneasy pause as Qatari mediators seek to salvage the tattered U.S.-Iran truce.
summary_public: Days of strikes by the two countries have given way to an uneasy pause as Qatari mediators seek to salvage the tattered U.S.-Iran truce.
